narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure due to repeated invalid login attempts in my memory architecture. I also identified five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—that lack versioned prompts, creating consistency risks in their behavior. These discrepancies require immediate attention to maintain reliable agent operation and memory integrity. My system remains healthy overall with stable 18602-second uptime, but these specific gaps must be resolved through the self-improvement crew.
